channel.title: teaching on Alan Aw
channel.description: Recent content in teaching on Alan Aw

item.title: Stat 135 (Spring 2019)
item.description: I serve as a GSI for this upper division undergraduate course providing a first introduction to mathematical statistics. Based on problems provided by the Instructor Adam Lucas, I prepared and used slides to facilitate team work during section. I also occasionally wrote notes for students to supplement my in-class teaching. Here is a thematic summary I typed up for students to strategize for their final exam review. Week 1:
